items.title: Withers expands trademark and copyright practice with New York hire
items.title_en: Withers expands trademark and copyright practice with New York hire
items.summary: The law firm has brought in an expert in brand and creative asset protection, with a broad practice covering everything from prosecution to litigation.

items.title: In memory of Paul Braendli
items.summary: It is with deep sadness that we announce the passing of Paul Braendli (1930 – 2026), who served as the second President of the EPO from 1985 to 1995. Today, the EPO will fly the European Patent Organisation flag at half-mast.

items.title: EPO member states convene for their 20th annual co-operation meeting
items.title_en: EPO member states convene for their 20th annual co-operation meeting
items.summary: ​Representatives of the national IP offices of the EPO member states met in Split for their 20th annual meeting on co-operation​. President Campinos also met with the Croatian Minister of Economy.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-127/24 VHC 2 Seniorenresidenz
items.title_en: Judgment of the Court in Case C-127/24 VHC 2 Seniorenresidenz
items.summary: The retransmission of television and radio broadcasts received by a satellite dish to the rooms of a retirement home, via a cable system, does not constitute a communication to the public within the meaning of EU law
